metadata.title: Ciaran McCullough - Portfolio
metadata.description: Ciaran McCullough — software engineer building frontend web, hybrid mobile, Android and full-stack products. Selected work, my stack, and how to get in touch.

error.title: Something went wrong
error.message: We couldn't load this page right now. Please try again in a moment.

contact.title: Let's build something together.
contact.intro: Open to frontend web, hybrid mobile, Android and full-stack roles, freelance, and the odd side quest.
contact.successMessage: Thanks — your enquiry just landed in my inbox. I'll get back to you within a day.
contact.submitError: Something went wrong sending your message. Please try again, or email me directly.

message.label: Enquiry
message.placeholder: Tell me a little about the project or role…

errors.name: Please enter your name (at least 2 letters).
errors.email: Please enter a valid email address.
errors.message: Please tell me a little more (at least 10 characters).

placeholder: This page is a placeholder — the full text is coming soon. It's here so the site's structure, navigation and footer links all work end to end.
Check back shortly for the complete, finalised wording.

copy.description: We use cookies to keep the site running, remember your preferences and understand how it's used. Strictly necessary cookies are always on. Everything else stays off until you say yes.

categories.title: Strictly necessary
categories.description: Required for the site to work safely — security, network management and remembering this very consent choice.
categories.meta: Legal basis · GDPR Art. 6(1)(f) — Legitimate interests · No consent needed

categories.title: Functional
categories.description: Remembers choices you make — preferred language or region, dark mode and layout preferences.

categories.title: Performance & analytics
categories.description: Aggregate insight into how the site is used — page views, bounce rates and crash reports. Never identifies you directly.

categories.title: Targeting & marketing
categories.description: Third-party advertising cookies that build an interest profile across sites to personalise and measure ads.
categories.meta: Consent · Strict opt-in — blocked by default
